_instructions: Manus: Fill this template daily by 08:00 GST using deep research from the sources listed below. Save the completed file as data/manual-update.json in the geo-dashboard repo. Then run: node scripts/merge-manual-data.js
_sources: Reuters / Al Jazeera / Gulf News for conflict updates
ADNOC / ENOC for fuel supply status
KHDA / MOE for school closure announcements
Carrefour / Lulu / Spinneys for stock levels
dailyBriefing: Write a 2-3 sentence factual summary of overnight developments: intercept performance, diplomatic signals, infrastructure status.

kineticData._note: Add ONE new entry for today's date to each array below.

byNeighborhood._note: Set today's debris count for each neighborhood. Use 0 if no reports.

schoolClosures.label: Normal Operations
schoolClosures.guidance: Schools and government offices are operating on regular schedules.

supermarketStock.label: Adequate Stock
supermarketStock.guidance: All major chains fully stocked. Normal shopping advised.
